name: raptor_dbw_msgs
description: Messages for the New Eagle Raptor DBW kit interface

AcceleratorPedalCmd.raw:
# Accelerator pedal (%)
float32 pedal_cmd

float32 torque_cmd # %-torque

float32 speed_cmd # m/s

# Enable
bool enable

# Ignore driver overrides
bool ignore

# Watchdog counter (optional)
uint8 rolling_counter

float32 road_slope # degrees - used with speed mode

ActuatorControlMode control_type

float32 accel_limit # m/s^2

float32 accel_positive_jerk_limit # m/s^3

# TODO(NERaptor): add checksum support

AcceleratorPedalReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Accelerator pedal
# 0 to 100%
float32 pedal_input
float32 pedal_output

# Status
bool enabled
bool ignore_driver
bool driver_activity   # Driver activity

bool fault_accel_pedal_system

# Faults
bool fault_ch1
bool fault_ch2

uint8 rolling_counter

float32 torque_actual # 0 to 100%

ActuatorControlMode control_type

ActuatorControlMode.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 OPEN_LOOP = 0
uint8 CLOSED_LOOP_ACTUATOR = 1
uint8 CLOSED_LOOP_VEHICLE = 2
uint8 NONE = 255

Brake2Report.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

float32 brake_pressure # units are bars, gauge pressure

float32 estimated_road_slope # degrees

float32 speed_set_point # m/s

BrakeCmd.raw:
# Brake pedal (%)
float32 pedal_cmd

# Enable
bool enable

# Watchdog counter (optional)
uint8 rolling_counter

float32 torque_cmd # %-torque 
float32 decel_limit # m/s^2

ActuatorControlMode control_type

float32 decel_negative_jerk_limit # m/s^3

ParkingBrake park_brake_cmd

# TODO(NERaptor): add checksum support

BrakeReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Brake pedal (%)
float32 pedal_position
float32 pedal_output

# Status
bool enabled  # Enabled
bool driver_activity   # Driver activity

bool fault_brake_system

uint8 rolling_counter

float32 brake_torque_actual # 0 to 100%

# Anti-lock Brakes and  Stability Control
bool intervention_active
bool intervention_ready

# Parking Brake
ParkingBrake parking_brake

ActuatorControlMode control_type

ButtonState.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NOT_PRESSED = 0
uint8 PRESSED = 1
uint8 SNA = 3

DoorLock.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NO_REQUEST=0
uint8 UNLOCK=1
uint8 LOCK=2
uint8 FAULT=3

DoorRequest.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NO_REQUEST=0
uint8 CLOSE=1
uint8 OPEN=2

DoorState.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 UNDEFINED = 0
uint8 CLOSED = 1
uint8 OPEN = 2
uint8 SNA = 3

DriverInputReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Turn Signal enumeration
TurnSignal turn_signal

# High beams
HighBeam high_beam_headlights

# Front Windshield Wipers enumeration
WiperFront wiper

# Buttons
bool cruise_resume_button
bool cruise_cancel_button
bool cruise_accel_button
bool cruise_decel_button
bool cruise_on_off_button
bool adaptive_cruise_on_off_button
bool adaptive_cruise_increase_distance_button
bool adaptive_cruise_decrease_distance_button
bool steer_wheel_button_a
bool steer_wheel_button_b
bool steer_wheel_button_c
bool steer_wheel_button_d
bool steer_wheel_button_e

# Door status
bool driver_door_ajar
bool passenger_door_ajar
bool rear_left_door_ajar
bool rear_right_door_ajar
bool liftgate_ajar
bool any_seatbelt_unbuckled
bool airbag_deployed
bool door_or_hood_ajar

ExitReport.description: This message catches values of several messages
ExitReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# This message catches values of several messages
# when DBW kit disables

bool akit_disable
bool driver_in_control
uint16 idx_auton_disable_no_brakes
uint16 idx_auton_disable_apply_brakes
uint8 auton_counter

FaultActionsReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

bool autonomous_disabled_no_brakes 
bool autonomous_disabled_apply_brakes 
bool can_gateway_disabled 
bool inverter_contactor_disabled 
bool prevent_enter_autonomous_mode 
bool warn_driver_only 
bool chime_fcw_beeps
uint16 last_active_fault_idx
bool estop_btn_pressed
ButtonState remote_estop_btn_pressed

Gear.raw:
uint8 gear

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 PARK=1
uint8 REVERSE=2
uint8 NEUTRAL=3
uint8 DRIVE=4
uint8 LOW=5
uint8 AUTO_HOLD=6
uint8 AUTO_SHIFT_UP=7
uint8 AUTO_SHIFT_DOWN=8

GearCmd.raw:
# Gear command enumeration
Gear cmd

bool enable

# Watchdog counter
uint8 rolling_counter

# TODO(NERaptor): add checksum support

GearReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Current gear enumeration
Gear state

# Gear reject flag
bool reject

# Status
bool driver_activity
bool enabled
uint8 trans_curr_gear

# Faults
bool gear_select_system_fault
bool gear_mismatch_flash

GlobalEnableCmd.raw:
bool global_enable

bool enable_joystick_limits

uint16 ecu_build_number

uint8 rolling_counter

# TODO(NERaptor): add checksum support

GpsReferenceReport.description: Low-res GPS reference point in degrees
GpsReferenceReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Low-res GPS reference point in degrees
# Use w/GPS Remainder Report for more precision
# 0.005 deg ~= 555 meters
float32 ref_latitude
float32 ref_longitude
float32 ref_heading

GpsRemainderReport.description: High-res remainder from GPS reference point in meters
GpsRemainderReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# High-res remainder from GPS reference point in meters
# Converted using basic Haversine formula
# Use w/GPS Reference Report
float32 rem_latitude
float32 rem_longitude

HighBeam.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 OFF = 0
uint8 ON = 1
uint8 FORCE_ON = 2
uint8 FORCE_OFF = 3

HighBeamState.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 OFF = 0
uint8 RESERVED = 1
uint8 ON = 2
uint8 SNA = 3

HmiGlobalEnableReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

bool enable_request

bool disable_request

uint8 checksum

uint16 ecu_build_number

uint8 rolling_counter

HornState.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 OFF = 0
uint8 ON = 1
uint8 SNA = 2

Ignition.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 NO_REQUEST = 0
uint8 FORCE_OFF = 1
uint8 ACCESSORY = 2
uint8 RUN = 3
uint8 CRANK = 4

LowBeam.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 OFF = 0
uint8 RESERVED = 1
uint8 FORCE_ON = 2
uint8 FORCE_OFF = 3

LowBeamState.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 OFF = 0
uint8 RESERVED = 1
uint8 ON = 2
uint8 SNA = 3

LowVoltageSystemReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

float32 dbw_battery_volts # Volts
float32 vehicle_battery_volts # Volts 
float32 vehicle_battery_current # Amps
float32 vehicle_alternator_current #Amps

float32 dcdc_current # Amps
float32 alternator_current # Amps

bool aux_inverter_contactor # On/Off

# Turn signal command enumeration
TurnSignal cmd

DoorRequest door_request_right_rear

uint8 rolling_counter

HighBeam high_beam_cmd

WiperFront front_wiper_cmd

WiperRear rear_wiper_cmd

DoorRequest door_request_lift_gate

bool block_adaptive_cruise_buttons

MiscReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

float32 fuel_level          # %
bool drive_by_wire_enabled
float32 vehicle_speed       # km/h
uint16 software_build_number
bool general_actuator_fault
bool by_wire_ready
bool general_driver_activity
bool comms_fault
float32 ambient_temp # degrees-C

OtherActuatorsReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

Ignition ignition_state 
HornState horn_state 

# Lights
TurnSignal turn_signal_state 
bool turn_signal_sync
HighBeamState high_beam_state 
LowBeamState low_beam_state 

# Wipers
WiperFront front_wiper_state 
WiperRear rear_wiper_state 

# Doors
DoorState right_rear_door_state 
DoorState left_rear_door_state 
DoorState liftgate_door_state 
DoorLock door_lock_state

uint8 rolling_counter

ParkingBrake.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 NO_REQUEST=0
uint8 OFF=1
uint8 ON=2
uint8 FAULT=3

SonarArcNum.description: Unitless - based on bars on display
SonarArcNum.raw:
uint8 status

# Unitless - based on bars on display
uint8 NO_DISTANCE = 0
uint8 ARC1 = 1
uint8 ARC2 = 2
uint8 ARC3 = 3
uint8 ARC4 = 4
uint8 ARC5 = 5
uint8 ARC6 = 6
uint8 ARC7 = 7
uint8 ARC8 = 8
uint8 NO_ARC = 15

Steering2Report.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

float32 vehicle_curvature_actual # units are 1/m

float32 max_torque_driver # %-Torque

float32 max_torque_motor # %-Torque

float32 expect_torque_driver # %-Torque

SteeringCmd.raw:
# Steering Wheel
float32 angle_cmd        # degrees, range -500 to 500
float32 angle_velocity   # degrees/s, range 0 to 498, 0 = maximum

# Enable
bool enable

# Ignore driver overrides
bool ignore

# Watchdog counter (optional)
uint8 rolling_counter

float32 torque_cmd # %-torque

float32 vehicle_curvature_cmd # 1/m

ActuatorControlMode control_type

# TODO(NERaptor): add checksum support

SteeringReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Steering Wheel
float32 steering_wheel_angle      # degrees
float32 steering_wheel_angle_cmd  # degrees
float32 steering_wheel_torque     # 0 to 100%

# Status
bool enabled  
bool driver_activity

bool fault_steering_system

bool overheat_prevention_mode

uint8 rolling_counter

ActuatorControlMode control_type

bool steering_overheat_warning

SurroundReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

float32 front_radar_object_distance # meters
float32 rear_radar_object_distance # meters

SonarArcNum rear_right
SonarArcNum rear_left
SonarArcNum rear_center
SonarArcNum front_right
SonarArcNum front_left
SonarArcNum front_center

bool front_radar_distance_valid
bool parking_sonar_data_valid

TirePressureReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Tire pressures (kPa)
float32 front_left
float32 front_right
float32 rear_left
float32 rear_right

TurnSignal.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NONE = 0
uint8 LEFT = 1
uint8 RIGHT = 2
uint8 HAZARDS = 3
uint8 SNA = 7

TwistCmd.raw:
geometry_msgs/Twist twist
float32 accel_limit # m/s^2, zero = no limit
float32 decel_limit # m/s^2, zero = no limit

WatchdogStatus.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

uint8 source

uint8 NONE=0                        # No source for watchdog counter fault
uint8 OTHER_BRAKE=1                 # Fault determined by brake controller
uint8 OTHER_ACCELERATOR_PEDAL=2     # Fault determined by accelerator pedal controller
uint8 OTHER_STEERING=3              # Fault determined by steering controller
uint8 BRAKE_COUNTER=4               # Brake command counter failed to increment
uint8 BRAKE_DISABLED=5              # Brake transition to disabled while in gear or moving
uint8 BRAKE_COMMAND=6               # Brake command timeout after 100ms
uint8 BRAKE_REPORT=7                # Brake report timeout after 100ms
uint8 ACCELERATOR_PEDAL_COUNTER=8   # Accelerator pedal command counter failed to increment
uint8 ACCELERATOR_PEDAL_DISABLED=9  # Accelerator pedal transition to disabled while in gear or moving
uint8 ACCELERATOR_PEDAL_COMMAND=10  # Accelerator pedal command timeout after 100ms
uint8 ACCELERATOR_PEDAL_REPORT=11   # Accelerator pedal report timeout after 100ms
uint8 STEERING_COUNTER=12           # Steering command counter failed to increment
uint8 STEERING_DISABLED=13          # Steering transition to disabled while in gear or moving
uint8 STEERING_COMMAND=14           # Steering command timeout after 100ms
uint8 STEERING_REPORT=15            # Steering report timeout after 100ms

fields.name: NONE
fields.comment: No source for watchdog counter fault

fields.name: OTHER_ACCELERATOR_PEDAL
fields.comment: Fault determined by accelerator pedal controller

fields.name: BRAKE_COUNTER
fields.comment: Brake command counter failed to increment

fields.name: BRAKE_DISABLED
fields.comment: Brake transition to disabled while in gear or moving

fields.name: ACCELERATOR_PEDAL_COUNTER
fields.comment: Accelerator pedal command counter failed to increment

fields.name: ACCELERATOR_PEDAL_DISABLED
fields.comment: Accelerator pedal transition to disabled while in gear or moving

fields.name: STEERING_COUNTER
fields.comment: Steering command counter failed to increment

fields.name: STEERING_DISABLED
fields.comment: Steering transition to disabled while in gear or moving

WheelPositionReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Wheel positions (counts)
int16 front_left
int16 front_right
int16 rear_left
int16 rear_right

# Conversion factor
float32 wheel_pulses_per_rev

WheelSpeedReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Wheel speeds (rad/sec)
float32 front_left
float32 front_right
float32 rear_left
float32 rear_right

WheelSpeedType.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 ANGULAR = 0
uint8 LINEAR = 1

WiperFront.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 OFF = 0
uint8 INTERVAL_1 = 1
uint8 INTERVAL_2 = 2
uint8 INTERVAL_3 = 3
uint8 INTERVAL_4 = 4
uint8 INTERVAL_5 = 5
uint8 INTERVAL_6 = 6
uint8 CONSTANT_LOW = 11
uint8 CONSTANT_HIGH = 12
uint8 WASH_BRIEF = 13
uint8 WASH_CONTINUOUS = 14
uint8 SNA = 15

WiperRear.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 OFF = 0
uint8 INTERVAL_1 = 1
uint8 CONSTANT_LOW = 11
uint8 CONSTANT_HIGH = 12
uint8 WASH_BRIEF = 13
uint8 WASH_CONTINUOUS = 14
uint8 SNA = 15
